hero.description: Transforming spaces with innovative lighting solutions that combine aesthetics, functionality, and sustainability.

slide1.title: AL-Burhan
slide1.subtitle: Light Up Your Life
slide1.description: Transforming spaces with innovative lighting solutions that blend elegance, functionality, and cutting-edge technology to create breathtaking environments.

slide2.title: Innovation
slide2.subtitle: Leading Lighting Solutions
slide2.description: Pioneering the future of illumination with state-of-the-art LED technology, smart lighting systems, and energy-efficient designs that redefine modern living.

slide3.title: Excellence
slide3.subtitle: Premium Quality Products
slide3.description: Crafted with precision and passion, our premium lighting collections combine exceptional craftsmanship with luxurious materials to elevate any space.

slide4.title: Design
slide4.subtitle: Elegant Lighting Designs
slide4.description: Where artistry meets functionality. Our curated designs seamlessly integrate aesthetic beauty with practical innovation, creating timeless pieces that inspire.

slide5.title: Experience
slide5.subtitle: 20+ Years of Expertise
slide5.description: Drawing from over two decades of industry excellence, we deliver unmatched expertise in lighting design, installation, and project implementation across the globe.

slide6.title: Quality
slide6.subtitle: Exceptional Craftsmanship
slide6.description: Every fixture is meticulously engineered and quality-assured, ensuring durability, performance, and lasting beauty that exceeds the highest international standards.

slide7.title: Vision
slide7.subtitle: Illuminating Your Future
slide7.description: Embracing tomorrow's possibilities today. We envision a world where intelligent lighting transforms how we live, work, and experience our surroundings.

introduction.title: About AL-Burhan
introduction.description: AL-Burhan is a leading lighting solutions provider with over 20 years of experience in the industry. We specialize in delivering innovative and exceptional lighting services across the region, combining quality, expertise, and customer satisfaction.
introduction.additionalInfo: Throughout our 20+ years of operation, we have successfully completed hundreds of projects across the globe, establishing a strong presence in China, Kuwait, UAE, and Egypt. Our commitment to quality craftsmanship, cutting-edge technology, and exceptional customer service has made us the trusted choice for lighting solutions.

founder.name: Mr. Murtaza Bohra
founder.quote: Our commitment to excellence has driven us to become a leading force in the lighting industry, delivering innovative solutions that transform spaces and inspire communities worldwide.
founder.quote2: With over two decades of experience, we continue to set new standards in quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, lighting the way for a brighter future.

coFounder.name: Mr. Shabbir Ratlamwala
coFounder.quote: Our vision extends beyond business success; we strive to make a meaningful impact on the communities we serve, one project at a time.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us. We'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: Leading lighting solutions provider delivering innovative and exceptional lighting services across the region.
